Gold Earrings Footer

Gold Earrings - Timeless Elegance for Every Style

Gold earrings are a timeless accessory that transcend trends and complement any style. Here at Tanishq, we offer a diverse collection of gold earrings for men and women, ensuring you find the ideal piece that perfectly embodies who you are. From small gold earrings perfect for everyday wear to the exquisite latest design of gold earrings for formal occasions, our selection has something for everyone. Our gold earrings are a testament to immense design, crafted to resonate with the elegance of the gold rate today.

Discover gold earrings perfect for every occasion - from daily wear to weddings. Shop from 3,000+ designs, including studs, hoops, drops, jhumkas, and wedding styles. Explore pocket-friendly gold earrings starting at affordable prices, all crafted with BIS-hallmarked purity by India’s most trusted jeweller - Tanishq, a Tata product. Explore our gold earrings price to find a stunning piece within your budget, such as our 1 gram gold earrings new design or the 3 gram gold earrings new design options. Each pair of gold earrings in our collection is thoughtfully priced to reflect the timeless beauty embodied by the 22 carat gold rate.

Explore Our Gold Earrings for Men & Women

  • Gold Stud Earrings: The epitome of versatility, gold stud earrings are a must-have in any jewelry collection. This simple yet sophisticated gold earrings design makes them perfect for everyday wear, while their ability to sparkle effortlessly adds elegance to formal attire. Choose stud gold earrings for women for both offices and casual settings.
  • Gold Hoop Earrings: A timeless classic, gold hoop earrings offer a touch of modern edge. Choose from a variety of sizes and thicknesses to match your style preference - from gold hoop earrings for women or delicate huggie hoops for a minimalist look to bold statement hoops that command attention. Don't overlook our gold hoop earrings design selection for a truly classic appeal.
  • Gold Drop Earrings: Adding a touch of elegance and movement, gold drop earrings offer a more dramatic look. Let your personality shine with drop designs, geometric shapes, or playful dangling charms. Discover long gold earrings design for a striking addition to your ensemble.
  • Gold Jhumka Earrings: Exuding tradition and cultural flair, explore our exquisite collection of gold jhumka earrings. This gold earrings design, often featuring cascading chains and mesmerizing bells, add a touch of grandeur to any outfit. You'll also discover options like our 10 gram gold jhumka price configuration for grand events.

Gold Earrings Latest Designs - Stay Ahead of the Fashion Curve for Different Occasions:

Your choice of gold earrings can seamlessly transition from casual settings to formal occasions. Explore our latest gold earrings design curated for every event to ensure you remain a trendsetter:

  • Casual Earrings: For everyday wear, opt for comfortable and stylish earrings like small gold stud earrings or classy sui dhaga gold earrings. These versatile pieces complement your outfit without overwhelming your look.
  • Modern Earrings: If you’re looking for a new design for gold earrings in your wardrobe, channel your inner trendsetter with our modern gold pendant set with earrings or explore our latest new trending earrings gold.
  • Traditional Earrings: Embrace your heritage with our stunning collection of traditional gold earrings or consider earrings for women gold designs for an authentic touch.
  • Wedding Earrings: As the bride, radiate elegance on your special day with our exquisite collection of wedding earrings and gold necklace with earrings sets. Consider a gold pendant set with earrings for a cohesive look.
  • Workwear Earrings: Exude class with our sophisticated collection of gold earrings for women in the professional world.

Tanishq Presents Mriganka - Hand crafted jewellery inspired by a magical realm

Introducing the Tanishq Mriganka collection - where intricate designs and impeccable artistry bring cultural heritage and style into perfect harmony.

Reimagine Your Old Gold with Tanishq's Exchange Program

Tanishq's Exchange Program enables customers to trade in their old gold from any jeweller for newer designs, at the same time ensuring they receive the best possible value for their gold.
